framework.name: XAA (Cross App Access) as MCP Enterprise-Managed Authorization
framework.description: Okta's XAA shifts consent to the identity provider level, now part of MCP spec since Nov 2025. Tracks and revokes delegation lineage centrally.
framework.raw_quote: XAA... shifts consent to the identity provider, now part of MCP (as of Nov 2025) under 'Enterprise-Managed Authorization.' Based on ID-JAG, it tracks and revokes delegation lineage.

source.title: Control the Chain, Secure the System: Fixing AI Agent Delegation
